channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: "Ill-Advised": Trump's Massive July 4 Firework Show Raises Health Alarms

media:content.media:description: More than 850,000 fireworks will launch across 10 sites around the Lincoln Memorial in Washington DC.

item.description: That's the question as Washington prepares to break the record for the world's largest fireworks display on the United States' 250th birthday on Saturday.
item.content:encoded: That's the question as Washington prepares to break the record for the world's largest fireworks display on the United States' 250th birthday on Saturday.

item.title: Russia Launches Intense Drone And Missile Attack On Kyiv Killing 21

media:content.media:description: Ukrainian officials say they are trying to force Putin to the negotiating table

item.description: Loud explosions shook the Ukrainian capital, where more than 50,000 people sheltered in subway stations after authorities issued air raid warnings, the Kyiv Metro said.
item.content:encoded: Loud explosions shook the Ukrainian capital, where more than 50,000 people sheltered in subway stations after authorities issued air raid warnings, the Kyiv Metro said.

item.title: 9 Killed In Cafe Blast In Syria's Damascus

media:content.media:description: The explosion near the main courthouse complex.

item.description: The Interior Ministry is set to announce its initial findings soon, said Damascus Governor Maher Idlibi.
item.content:encoded: The Interior Ministry is set to announce its initial findings soon, said Damascus Governor Maher Idlibi.

item.title: Names Of 10 Founding Nations For Global Defence Bank Soon: Canada

media:content.media:description: The project's fate remains uncertain.

item.description: The bank's purpose is to bolster the defence of allied nations by raising up to £100 billion ($133 billion) in cheap finance.
item.content:encoded: The bank's purpose is to bolster the defence of allied nations by raising up to £100 billion ($133 billion) in cheap finance.

item.title: Buried In Rubble After Earthquake For 8 Days, Venezuela Man Rescued Alive

media:content.media:description: The rescue was considered a small miracle cutting through a week of tragedy

item.description: Hernan Alberto Gil Flores emerged to safety covered in dust atop a stretcher surrounded by helmet-clad rescue workers after being trapped since June 24 under rubble in the basement of the Galerias Playa Grande shopping center in the coastal town in La Guaira.
item.content:encoded: Hernan Alberto Gil Flores emerged to safety covered in dust atop a stretcher surrounded by helmet-clad rescue workers after being trapped since June 24 under rubble in the basement of the Galerias Playa Grande shopping center in the coastal town in La Guaira.

item.title: India-Japan Summit Expands Strategic Partnership Across Defence And Trade

media:content.media:description: The outcomes emerged from the 16th India Japan Annual Summit in New Delhi

item.description: The summit marked Takaichi's first official visit to India after assuming office and came at a time of growing geopolitical uncertainty, supply chain disruptions and heightened security challenges across the Indo Pacific.
item.content:encoded: The summit marked Takaichi's first official visit to India after assuming office and came at a time of growing geopolitical uncertainty, supply chain disruptions and heightened security challenges across the Indo Pacific.

item.title: PM Modi And Takaichi Deepen India-Japan Ties On AI And Technology

media:content.media:description: PM Modi endorsed Takaichi's announcement that Japan will host a global AI summit

item.description: The joint statement, issued in the capital, frames AI as a defining technology whose governance choices today will shape economic security and international power balances for decades.
item.content:encoded: The joint statement, issued in the capital, frames AI as a defining technology whose governance choices today will shape economic security and international power balances for decades.

item.title: Trump Posts AI Video Of Him As Doctor, Mocks Celebrities Like Julia Roberts

media:content.media:description: The video includes AI versions of celebrities who have criticised Trump

item.description: The clip was posted on Trump's social media platform, Truth Social. It later appeared on X after White House Deputy Chief of Staff Dan Scavino Jr shared it.
item.content:encoded: The clip was posted on Trump's social media platform, Truth Social. It later appeared on X after White House Deputy Chief of Staff Dan Scavino Jr shared it.

item.title: India, Japan Unveil Resilience Partnership To Boost Energy Security

media:content.media:description: A key pillar of the partnership is collaboration in the strategic stockpiling ecosystem

item.description: A key pillar of the partnership is collaboration in the strategic stockpiling ecosystem. Both countries agreed to share expertise on the management of national petroleum reserves, including mechanisms involving industry-held stockpiles.
item.content:encoded: A key pillar of the partnership is collaboration in the strategic stockpiling ecosystem. Both countries agreed to share expertise on the management of national petroleum reserves, including mechanisms involving industry-held stockpiles.

item.title: Chinese Woman Tries To Save Husband From Cobra Bite, Gets Poisoned Herself

media:content.media:description: She put her mouth to the wound and tried to extract the poison.

item.description: The hospital administered antivenom to the couple, cleaned and treated the wounds, and provided supportive care.
item.content:encoded: The hospital administered antivenom to the couple, cleaned and treated the wounds, and provided supportive care.

item.title: Germany Makes Medical Certificate Must For Even 1 Sick Day In Reform Push

media:content.media:description: Employers would be able to ask for a doctor's certificate from the first sick day (AI generated image)

item.description: The tougher rules for sick leave would no longer allow employees to call in sick to work for up to three days without seeing a doctor or call up the doctor and ask for a sick leave letter of one week without actually seeing the doctor.
item.content:encoded: The tougher rules for sick leave would no longer allow employees to call in sick to work for up to three days without seeing a doctor or call up the doctor and ask for a sick leave letter of one week without actually seeing the doctor.

item.title: "Heard Screams, Crying": Family Of 3 From Gujarat Killed In US Motel Fire

media:content.media:description: Images showed heavy damage to a back, detached section of the motel (AI generated)

item.description: The victims were identified as Hiteshbhai Suthar, his wife, Hinaben, and their 20-year-old daughter, Ishani. They were trapped inside a room in the motel, a fire official told news agency Associated Press.
item.content:encoded: The victims were identified as Hiteshbhai Suthar, his wife, Hinaben, and their 20-year-old daughter, Ishani. They were trapped inside a room in the motel, a fire official told news agency Associated Press.

item.title: Pak Army Handed Guns To Kashmiris, Now They Call Us Terrorists: PoK Leader

media:content.media:description: Khan claimed that it is Pakistan's military that originally supplied weapons to Kashmiris

item.description: Sardar Aman Khan, the leader of the Joint Awami Action Committee, claimed that it is Pakistan's military that originally supplied weapons to Kashmiris.
item.content:encoded: Sardar Aman Khan, the leader of the Joint Awami Action Committee, claimed that it is Pakistan's military that originally supplied weapons to Kashmiris.

item.title: Doorbell Camera Captures Neighbours Saving 87-Year-Old From House Fire

media:content.media:description: The elderly was asleep upstairs without her hearing aids in.

item.description: Doorbell camera footage showed a group of neighbours in pyjamas hammering on the locked front door as flames engulfed the property.
item.content:encoded: Doorbell camera footage showed a group of neighbours in pyjamas hammering on the locked front door as flames engulfed the property.

item.title: After Pak, It's Bangladesh, Myanmar: China Plans New Corridor Bordering India

media:content.media:description: The corridor would start in Kunming, capital of China's Yunnan province, and run to Mandalay in Myanmar

item.description: The plans about the corridor to India's east come after China got access to the Arabian Sea with the China-Pakistan Economic Corridor to the west. India strongly objects to the CPEC corridor because it runs through Gilgit-Baltistan, which is a part of Pakistan-occupied Kashmir.
item.content:encoded: The plans about the corridor to India's east come after China got access to the Arabian Sea with the China-Pakistan Economic Corridor to the west. India strongly objects to the CPEC corridor because it runs through Gilgit-Baltistan, which is a part of Pakistan-occupied Kashmir.

item.title: Indonesian Couple Publicly Caned 21 Times Over TikTok Kissing Video

media:content.media:description: Indonesian couple publicly caned 21 times over kissing in TikTok livestream

item.description: In Indonesia's Aceh province, a Sharia court sentenced an unmarried couple to public caning after their TikTok kissing video sparked outrage
item.content:encoded: In Indonesia's Aceh province, a Sharia court sentenced an unmarried couple to public caning after their TikTok kissing video sparked outrage

item.title: Japan Parliament Adds 2 More Women's Toilets For 68 Female MPs

media:content.media:description: Japan Parliament Adds 2 Women's Stalls; Ranks 118th in Gender Gap

item.description: Japan's 1936 lower house has 22 women's stalls versus 67 for men, reflecting a political gender gap with women holding just 68 of 465 seats.
item.content:encoded: Japan's 1936 lower house has 22 women's stalls versus 67 for men, reflecting a political gender gap with women holding just 68 of 465 seats.

item.title: 5 Killed, 16 Injured As Blast Rips Through Damascus Cafe

media:content.media:description: Damascus has been the site of multiple attacks and incidents.

item.description: The blast took place near the capital's Palace of Justice, a key government building, sparking scenes of panic in the busy area.
item.content:encoded: The blast took place near the capital's Palace of Justice, a key government building, sparking scenes of panic in the busy area.

item.title: Speed, Quality: Experts On What India-Japan Manufacturing Partnership Needs

media:content.media:description: Industry leaders said India has the potential to become Japan's preferred manufacturing base.

item.description: At NDTV's Indo-Japan Strategic Dialogue, industry leaders said India's scale, talent and infrastructure, combined with Japan's technology and manufacturing expertise, can create a globally competitive production hub.
item.content:encoded: At NDTV's Indo-Japan Strategic Dialogue, industry leaders said India's scale, talent and infrastructure, combined with Japan's technology and manufacturing expertise, can create a globally competitive production hub.

item.title: Israel Marks 1,000 Days Of Gaza War With Memorials And Protests

media:content.media:description: Israel Marks 1,000 Days Since October 7 Attacks

item.description: Families demand a state inquiry into the October 7 failures as the war reaches 1,000 days with over 73,000 casualties and Israeli forces holding 70% of Gaza.
item.content:encoded: Families demand a state inquiry into the October 7 failures as the war reaches 1,000 days with over 73,000 casualties and Israeli forces holding 70% of Gaza.
